Login.title: A secure CRM shell for sales work, structured admin lists, and bilingual delivery.
Login.subtitle: This first slice establishes the app router, locale handling, and protected navigation so the rest of Sprint 1 can land on stable ground.

secure.title: Protected routes
secure.body: Public and private route groups are already separated to keep auth work contained.

bilingual.title: English and Hebrew
bilingual.body: Core shell strings are now framework-level translations instead of hardcoded UI text.

mobile.title: Responsive shell
mobile.body: The foundation is designed for desktop tables and one-thumb mobile access.

form.title: Sign in to the foundation shell
form.subtitle: Sprint 1 now uses trusted server-side credentials and signed sessions instead of a demo role picker.
form.hint: Sprint 1 review account: admin@crm.local with password shir.

Dashboard.title: Sprint 1 baseline is live
Dashboard.subtitle: The current shell proves route protection, responsive layout, and locale plumbing while keeping {role} access visible during implementation.

cards.auth: Credentials are validated against trusted server-side user records, and the session cookie is signed before protected routes open.
cards.rbac: Role-aware shell navigation is already separated from page content, which keeps permission work focused.
cards.data: Prisma, the baseline schema, and admin-managed lookup values are now part of the Sprint 1 foundation.

AdminLists.title: Admin list foundation
AdminLists.subtitle: Admin users can now create categories, add values, edit bilingual labels, and toggle activation state without touching code.
AdminLists.restrictedBody: Only admin users should manage shared lookup values. Editors and viewers are intentionally blocked from this area.

errors.generic: Complete all required fields before submitting admin list changes.

createCategory.title: Create a category
createCategory.body: Add a reusable lookup group for Sprint 2 imports and Sprint 3 CRM forms.

AccessDenied.title: This area is outside your current role
AccessDenied.body: Sprint 1 enforces role boundaries on the server. Viewer users are read-only, and editor users do not manage admin settings.
